info.title: TM Seasons API Docs
info.description: REST API for TM Seasons, covering Discord authentication, Trackmania club and map administration, season lifecycle management, leaderboard polling, event-based scoring, standings, and activity feeds.

tags.name: Identity
tags.description: Current-user profile and Discord authentication endpoints.

tags.name: Trackmania - Public
tags.description: Public Trackmania club, member, and map endpoints.

tags.name: Trackmania - Admin
tags.description: Admin-only Trackmania club synchronization and management endpoints.

tags.name: Seasons - Public
tags.description: Public season discovery, leaderboards, standings, and activity endpoints.

tags.name: Seasons - Admin
tags.description: Admin-only season lifecycle, map assignment, polling, scoring, and finalization endpoints.

get.description: Returns the signed-in user's profile, Discord identity fields, admin flag, and last login timestamp.
Returns imported map metadata for the requested Trackmania map UID.
get.summary: Get a Trackmania map by UID

get.description: Returns paginated clubs ordered by most recently imported first.
Returns the selected club and its public metadata.
Returns paginated members for a club, optionally filtered by active membership.
Returns paginated imported maps ordered by most recently imported first.
Returns the selected imported map and admin-visible metadata.

patch.description: Updates editable fields for an imported Trackmania map.

delete.description: Removes an imported map from the local database.

post.description: Fetches map metadata from Trackmania services by UID and stores or updates the local map.

message.const: Trackmania API failure while importing map.

get.description: Returns paginated clubs ordered by most recently imported first.
Returns the selected club and admin-visible metadata.

post.description: Imports or updates club members from Trackmania services for the provided club ID.

get.description: Returns paginated members for a selected club, with optional search, active, and sort filters.
Returns the configured primary club, falling back to the oldest imported club when needed.

post.description: Uses the supplied club ID when present, otherwise syncs the configured primary club.

get.description: Returns paginated members for the primary club, with optional search, active, and sort filters.
get.summary: List primary club members for admins

get.description: Returns scheduled, active, ended, and finalized seasons ordered by start date.
Returns a visible season by slug with its maps ordered for season play.
Returns each active season map with ordered player records.
Returns ordered player records for one map within a season.
Returns calculated point standings for a season by slug.
Returns paginated point events for a season, optionally filtered by player.
Returns one player's season standing and map milestones.
Returns paginated seasons with creator information.

post.description: Stores a new season and records the authenticated admin as creator.

get.description: Returns a season with creator and ordered map assignments.

patch.description: Updates season settings and validates the requested lifecycle state.

delete.description: Removes the selected season from the local database.

post.description: Calculates final placement rewards and transitions an ended season to finalized.
Applies scheduled lifecycle transitions based on the current time.
Adds an imported map to a season and returns the season with ordered maps.
post.summary: Attach a map to a season

patch.description: Changes ordering or active state for a map attached to a season.

delete.description: Removes a map assignment from the selected season.
delete.summary: Detach a map from a season

post.description: Fetches current leaderboard data for active season maps and persists snapshots and records.

message.const: Only active seasons can be polled.

get.description: Returns paginated player records for a season, optionally filtered by map or player.
Returns calculated standings and total point event count for a season.
Returns paginated point events with optional player, map, and type filters.

post.description: Rebuilds point events for a season and returns the updated event count.

get.description: Returns paginated poll runs with their seasons.
Returns a poll run with its season and captured snapshots.

sanctum.description: Use a Laravel Sanctum bearer token for protected endpoints.

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
